expectedClassifications.notes: Structural layout wrapper (renders children, pageTitle, filters) but not in the layout exceptions list. Has 4 props, no hooks, no side effects. DDAU_COMPONENT is the correct classification given the interpreter's vocabulary -- it genuinely follows DDAU.
Auth guard component listed in layout exceptions. Calls useAuthState (context hook) but the exception lookup fires first, correctly classifying as LAYOUT_SHELL.
